title: Executive Order 5485—Revocation of Withdrawal of Public Lands for Resurvey
text:
New Mexico
It is hereby ordered that Executive Order No. 4638, dated April 26, 1927, withdrawing the public lands in T. 20 N., Rs. 6 and 7 E., New Mexico principal meridian, New Mexico, pending a resurvey, be, and the same is hereby, revoked.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
November 14, 1930.
